chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-324 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 1357/24 3.For hearing of main case 15-05-2024 Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate has filed power along with comments on behalf of respondents No.2&3 and submits that petitioner has already withdrawn his call-deposit and subject process of tendering has matured. However, it has been disputed by the petitioner. Therefore, let petitioner file an application before the respondent No.2, who shall consider the same in accordance with law and in case, the process is not matured, issue him tender form and if the process has matured, he shall decide the application through an order with reasons under intimation to this Court. This petition along with listed application is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
